hero.title: See where Bitcoin sits in the current cycle before the crowd does.
hero.description: Cycle Atlas blends historical patterning, live price context, sentiment and halving timing into one decision surface.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.allFailed: Couldn't connect to the servers. Please try again later.

footer.dataSources: Prices from CoinGecko · Sentiment from Alternative.me
footer.disclaimer: The 1064/364 day pattern is based on past data — not financial advice.

cyclePosition.title: Where Are We Now?
cyclePosition.explainer: Shows which stage of the cycle Bitcoin appears to be in by comparing time since the bottom, the prior top and the average duration of each phase.

cycleOverlay.title: How Cycles Compare
cycleOverlay.subtitle: Each cycle starts at 1.0 — see how they grew over time
cycleOverlay.explainer: Lines up every cycle from its bottom so you can compare the current move's pace, strength and slowdown against prior ones.

bestDays.title: Best Days to Buy
bestDays.subtitle: Which days tend to have the lowest prices
bestDays.explainer: Uses the average historical daily move. The lower the average return, the more often that day offered better entries.

fearGreed.title: Market Mood
fearGreed.subtitle: Are people scared or greedy right now?
fearGreed.explainer: Summarizes market sentiment. Extreme fear often shows up near panic, while extreme greed tends to show up near euphoria.

halving.title: Next Halving
halving.subtitle: When Bitcoin's mining reward gets cut in half
halving.explainer: Shows the countdown to the next halving, an event that reduces new BTC supply and has historically shifted the cycle's pace.

dca.title: What If You Invested Weekly?
dca.subtitle: See what would happen if you bought a little Bitcoin regularly
dca.explainer: Simulates recurring buys to show how much would have been invested, accumulated and what it would be worth today.

cycleStats.title: Past Cycles
cycleStats.subtitle: How long did each cycle last?
cycleStats.explainer: Summarizes the average duration of up and down phases and compares prior cycles side by side.

ath.title: All-Time High
ath.subtitle: Bitcoin's highest price ever — and when the next one might happen
ath.explainer: Shows the current record and estimates when a new all-time high could happen based on prior cycle behavior.
ath.avgDaysAfter: ATH usually comes ~{{days}} days after a halving

peak.title: Peak Analysis
peak.subtitle: When is the best time to sell? Multiple signals combined
peak.explainer: Combines time since the bottom, post-halving timing, historical peak windows and price projections to estimate how close the market is to a top.
peak.projectionExplainATH: Based on historical ATH-over-ATH multipliers (each cycle sets a new high, but by a smaller factor)
peak.diminishingNote: Returns tend to decrease each cycle — past performance doesn't guarantee future results
